title: 將軍澳澳景路唔再俾外人行

replies.msg:
澳景路喺未有維景灣畔嗰時已經存在，地產商一直都冇擁有過呢條路。政府當年賣地係要求地產商管理澳景路，業權擁有者一直都係政府。





但2018年12月24日開始，緊急車輛通道（紅磚路）和澳景路之間的鐵閘落成啟用，鐵閘只供有已登記八達通的住客通過，訪客不能往來紅磚路和澳景路。即對眾多行山、跑步或騎單車的訪客來說澳景路變成掘頭路，不能利用澳景路往來油塘和調景嶺。

As spoken between your goodself and Simon / Stephen of this Office on 15.10.2013 / 16.10.2013 respectively, we fully understand your concerns on the signs put up on O King Road (澳景路) at Tseung Kwan O. All along TD has been insisting the view that O King Road meets the standard for a public road and is suitable for use by all road users including cyclists, despite we have repeatedly received requests and complaints by nearby residents for banning cycling on this road section. TD still maintains this view now.

According to the Lands Department (LandsD), O king Road is a non-exclusive right-of-way (非專用通道), or "Brown Area", of the Ocean Shores (維景灣畔), constructed by the developer and being maintained and managed by the Grantee/owners of the development.
Regarding the sign posted on the lamp pole (), it is not a regulatory sign stipulated in the Road Traffic Ordinance and therefore not enforceable under this ordinance.

We further note the following advice of LandsD, for your information please :-

"Under the concerned lease (地契), the Grantee (承批人) of the lot is given a right to use, uphold and maintain the Brown Area shown on the lease plan, which now lies the O King Road. The Grantee is required to construct a paved motorway and a paved footpath for the purposes of vehicular and a pedestrian ingress and regress to and from the lot. Whilst the grant of the right of way shall not give the Grantee the exclusive right over O King Road as the Government shall have the right to grant rights of way over O King Road to the owners of any other lots on the vicinity, the use of O King Road as a vehicular access is limited to vehicles belonging to the residents and their bona fide visitors. That said, the pedestrian access shall be allowed over the right of way by the public. However, vehicular access is limited to the residents of their bona fide visitors of the development only. Please be advised that bicycle is regarded as one kind of vehicles under the concerned ordinance."
As the access right at O King Road is governed by the lease as mentioned above, the concerned sign may likely be put up by residents or the management office of Ocean Shores. I hope you will appreciate that TD does not have any authority to act against the lease.

Just let us know If you need any clarification or further information on the above.
Regards
SE/HP/NTE, TD

簡單講，澳景路就唔係私家路，但地契畀佢有權限制入澳景路嘅車。咁多年以嚟外來車就一定唔比行澳景，而單車都喺條文上都屬於vehicle；但一直以嚟就勁多單車友去踩，仲同嗰邊啲業主嘈到七彩，亦都出過幾次意外落人話柄。所以依家維景灣畔就直接起個閘ban鳩哂所有外來人。所以問題重點係佢依家要管埋啲行人入澳景路。
藍田入澳景路同衛奕信徑落澳景路就唔會有閘架啦，除非維景灣畔同區議會都傻撚咗。所以將來單車嘅情況就係偷雞喺油塘度踩上去，一就由衛奕信徑踩架單車落去。唯一可以嘈嘅位就只係佢冇權限制行人由調景嶺入澳景路。

私人屋苑唔畀外來人自出自入我諗大家都明解，件事尷尬在於維景灣畔呢個私人屋苑就擋住調景嶺入澳景路嘅入口。
簡單講，澳景路就唔係私家路，但地契畀佢有權限制入澳景路嘅車。咁多年以嚟外來車就一定唔比行澳景，而單車都喺條文上都屬於vehicle；但一直以嚟就勁多單車友去踩，仲同嗰邊啲業主嘈到七彩，亦都出過幾次意外落人話柄。所以依家維景灣畔就直接起個閘ban鳩哂所有外來人。所以問題重點係佢依家要管埋啲行人入澳景路。
藍田入澳景路同衛奕信徑落澳景路就唔會有閘架啦，除非維景灣畔同區議會都傻撚咗。所以將來單車嘅情況就係偷雞喺油塘度踩上去，一就由衛奕信徑踩架單車落去。唯一可以嘈嘅位就只係佢冇權限制行人由調景嶺入澳景路。
